name: EvoSculpt Smart 4 – HIFEM Body Sculpting with 4 Applicators
shortDescription: The EvoSculpt Smart 4 is a professional, 4-applicator HIFEM body sculpting device that allows you to treat 2 clients simultaneously. 8500W power, 20,000 muscle contractions in 30 minutes – double capacity, double revenue.
description:
The EvoSculpt Smart 4 is the upgraded, premium version of the popular EvoSculpt Smart, featuring 4 applicators. The HIFEM (High-Intensity Focused Electromagnetic) technology delivers 8500W power, reaching deep muscle tissue up to 8 cm depth.

The 4 applicators enable you to treat 2 clients simultaneously, or treat 2 body areas on a single client in parallel. This capacity doubles your revenue potential in the same amount of time.

In 30 minutes, up to 20,000 muscle contractions are generated per applicator, equivalent to 5 hours of cardio exercise. The process simultaneously activates fat cell breakdown and muscle building, in a completely non-invasive, painless way.
metaTitle: EvoSculpt Smart 4 HIEMT | 4-Applicator Body Sculpting | Skinlab Hungary
metaDescription: EvoSculpt Smart 4: 4-applicator HIFEM body sculpting. Treat 2 clients simultaneously, 8500W, 20,000 muscle contractions/30 min. Double capacity, double revenue.

videoDescription.headline: Double capacity, double revenue – why choose the 4-applicator version?
paragraphs: Demand for body sculpting treatments is continuously growing. The EvoSculpt Smart 4 enables you to treat twice as many clients in the same time, or treat 2 body areas on a single client in parallel – maximizing your revenue.
A single 30-minute treatment is priced at 25,000–40,000 Ft. With 4 applicators, you can perform 10–16 treatments per day, potentially generating 2–4 million Ft in monthly revenue.
The 4-applicator configuration is not just a capacity expansion: it lends a more professional image to your salon, and clients appreciate when you work on multiple areas simultaneously.

featureRows.headline: Why do professionals choose the EvoSculpt Smart 4?
featureRows.subtitle: 4 applicators, double capacity, maximum efficiency

features.title: 4 applicators – treat 2 clients simultaneously
features.description:
The EvoSculpt Smart 4's key advantage is its 4 applicators, which revolutionize salon capacity and revenue potential.

Application options:

2 clients treated simultaneously – double revenue in the same time
1 client, 2 areas – e.g., abdomen + buttocks in parallel
Larger area coverage – more effective treatment on wider surfaces
Shorter total treatment time – clients complete their course faster

features.title: The same proven HIFEM technology
features.description:
The EvoSculpt Smart 4 uses the same high-performance HIFEM technology as the EvoSculpt Smart – with expanded capacity.
8500W power – reaching deep muscle layers up to 8 cm depth
20,000 muscle contractions per applicator in 30 minutes
30 min = the effectiveness of 5 hours of cardio
Dual effect: muscle building + fat cell apoptosis simultaneously
Visible results after just 4 treatments
painlessnon-invasiveradiation-free

features.title: Body sculpting across five areas
features.description:
The device is versatile across various body areas. With 4 applicators, complex multi-area treatment protocols can be designed.
Abdomen – fat reduction and abdominal muscle strengthening
Buttocks – natural buttock firming and lifting
Thighs – inner and outer thigh sculpting
Arms – arm sculpting, triceps strengthening
Calves – calf shaping and strengthening

features.title: Better than traditional muscle stimulators
features.description:
HIFEM technology fundamentally differs from conventional electrical muscle stimulators.
Deep-penetrating stimulation – up to 8 cm depth, not just surface muscles
4 treatments vs. 40 treatments – HIFEM delivers results much faster
Fat cell apoptosis – EMS cannot destroy fat cells
Also boosts cellular metabolism, with longer-lasting results

features.title: Who is the EvoSculpt Smart 4 recommended for?
features.description:
Higher-traffic salons and studios
Body sculpting centers seeking maximum capacity
Aesthetic clinics – for complex, multi-area protocols
For offering couples treatments – as a unique service
Businesses seeking faster return on investment

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: A professional operator training course is available for the EvoSculpt Smart 4 device, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education. The goal of the training is for participants to acquire comprehensive knowledge for the professional and safe delivery of HIFEM body sculpting treatments, including parallel treatment techniques with 4 applicators.
items: Operating principles and scientific background of HIFEM technology
Treatment areas: abdomen, buttocks, thighs, arms, calves
Course design, pricing, and client communication
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world, supervised educational environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the EvoSculpt Smart 4 device.
If you're interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to arrange an appointment!

testimonials.name: Németh Katalin
testimonials.text: The 4 applicators were the deciding factor for me. <mark>I can treat two clients at once, so my daily revenue has doubled</mark>. Clients appreciate that we work on multiple areas simultaneously – we complete the course faster and they're more satisfied with the results.

testimonials.name: Farkas Dóra
testimonials.text: I work in a larger salon, and the Smart 4 fits perfectly with our capacity. <mark>We offer couples treatments, which is a unique service in our area</mark>. The abdomen + buttocks parallel treatment is the most popular – we cover twice the area in 30 minutes.

expertQuote.quote: The 4-applicator configuration is not just a capacity expansion – it's a business strategy. The parallel treatment capability results in higher treatment prices, shorter course durations, and a more satisfied client base.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What's the difference between the EvoSculpt Smart and the Smart 4?
faq.answer: The main difference is the number of applicators: the EvoSculpt Smart 4 has four applicators, while the base model has one. With 4 applicators, you can treat 2 clients simultaneously or treat 2 body areas on a single client in parallel. The HIFEM technology and power output (8500W) are identical.

faq.question: How does HIFEM technology work?
faq.answer: HIFEM (High-Intensity Focused Electromagnetic) technology delivers focused electromagnetic impulses into deep muscle tissue, up to 8 cm depth. In 30 minutes, up to 20,000 muscle contractions are generated per applicator, simultaneously activating muscle building and fat cell breakdown.

faq.question: Can I really treat 2 clients at once?
faq.answer: Yes! The 4 applicators can be controlled independently, so you can treat 2 clients simultaneously with personalized intensity. This doubles your capacity and revenue potential.

faq.question: Who should not receive the treatment?
faq.answer: The treatment is not recommended for people with pacemakers, heart conditions, cancer, pregnant or breastfeeding women, diabetics, stroke survivors, or those with metal implants.

faq.question: When are results visible?
faq.answer: Visible results can be achieved after just 4 treatments. For optimal results, a course of 6–8 sessions is recommended, once per week. With 4 applicators, clients can complete the course faster because we treat multiple areas simultaneously.

faq.question: Is the treatment painful?
faq.answer: No, the treatment is completely painless. The client feels intense muscle contractions similar to the sensation after a strong workout, but it's not uncomfortable. No anesthesia is needed, and there's no recovery time after treatment.

faq.question: How quickly does the device pay for itself?
faq.answer: Thanks to the 4 applicators, you can work with double capacity. You can perform 10–16 treatments per day at 25,000–40,000 Ft per treatment. The device typically pays for itself within 2–3 months. Use our on-page ROI calculator!
